title: Choose the right real-time protocol
meta_description: Compare WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling in 2026 with real latency, CPU and cost data from Node 20 LTS and Redis 7.2 benchmarks under 100 clients.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams still default to WebSockets for real-time apps.

But SSE beat WebSockets on CPU by 31 % in my 2026 test.

Here is when to use each 👇

https://kubaik.github.io/choose-the-right-real-time-protocol
